episodes.title: The Forbidden Cult of Jacob Frank: Rituals, Power & A Legacy Hidden in Plain Sight
episodes.description:
What if one man's radical philosophy could shake the foundations of an entire religion — and leave a legacy that echoes into the modern world?

This video includes footage from the YouTube channel Predictive History.
The creator has publicly granted permission for us to reuse and monetize his content for educational and creative purposes.
